icon.description: An MDI icon reference in the form mdi:icon-name. Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphen and underscore allowed.

description: JSON schema for the icons.json file in a Home Assistant integration. Supports defining icons for service actions (and optional collapsible sections) under the services key, and (legacy/custom) entity state icons under the entity key. See: https://developers.home-assistant.io/docs/dev_101_services/#icons

additionalProperties.description: Translation key for the entity (matches entity_description.translation_key).

state.description: Mapping of raw state values to icons.

entity.description: (Optional) Entity icon overrides by domain and translation_key (custom pattern used by some integrations). Each translation_key object can define state icon mappings.

additionalProperties.description: Icon definition for a single service action.

sections.description: Optional mapping of collapsible section keys to icons.

service.description: Icon (mdi:) to represent the service action in UI editors.

services.description: Service action icon definitions mapped by service action name.

title: Home Assistant Integration Icons (icons.json)
